learnings.text: The scores_complete.json structure contains 3 evidence_type values (Story+profile, Profile, Transferable) that enable evidence quality differentiation - use this for any trust/transparency visualizations
Importance weighting (1-10 scale in scores_complete.json) enables weighted scoring algorithms that show strategic fit rather than raw match percentages - incorporate into fit metrics

GitHub profile activity cadence (recent engagement) matters more than total historical numbers - consistent recent commits signal active developer, while 100 commits/year with no activity in 6 months signals lapsed engagement
